chapter1.text: Morning sunlight spilled softly into the classroom as students settled into their seats.
A pen slipped quietly from a girl's bag and rolled across the floor.

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: Okay… but how do you know my name?

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: Don't be silly, of course I know the name of the school topper.
A faint blush touched Yumei’s cheeks.
Later that afternoon, the hallway buzzed softly as students moved between classrooms.
You and Yumei slowly walked through the corridor together.

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: Hey Yumei… since we're friends now, introduce yourself
A tiny smile appeared on Yumei’s face.

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: That's kind of you to say...

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: But how can I introduce myself first?

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: Wouldn't it be easier if you showed me first?

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: Well… I'm {username}. I like making websites and learning random things

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: And… aha… I'm actually really into reading manhwas.
The corridor slowly grew quieter as you both kept walking together.

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: So Yumei… what would you like to do after school?

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: I think I want to become a computer engineer.

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: Computer engineers earn a lot here yk haha

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: What about you? What's your ambition?

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: Same actually. I want to become a computer engineer too.

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: Is it really a coincidence or is there some other reason?

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: Coincidences can be surprisingly good sometimes.

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: I also make websites in my free time.
The school day slowly came to an end.
Golden sunlight stretched across the school gate as students headed home.

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: It was really a pleasure talking to you today, Yumei.

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: Yeah… sadly it's time to say bye.

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: Hey Yumei… why don't you try making websites too?

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: I want to… but I get confused and can't make any.

chapter1.speaker: {username}
chapter1.text: Don't worry. I'll help you. I've made many websites
She looked at you with surprise and hope.

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: Oh… you're one of the nicest people I've met.

chapter1.speaker: Yumei
chapter1.text: Okay… I'll ask for your help when I need it.

chapter2.text: The next day passed more quietly than expected.
Soft sunlight slipped through the library windows as students sat quietly between shelves and tables.
You sat near the corner of the library with your laptop open.
The laptop rested in front of her while you explained the basics of making websites.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: See? It looks confusing at first...

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: But once you understand the structure, it actually becomes fun.
Every now and then, she quietly nodded while trying to follow along.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: You make this look way easier than it feels.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Trust me, my first website was terrible.
For a moment, she stopped looking at the screen.
There was something quietly warm in her expression.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: I said I would help, didn't I?

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: For some work, this can also give you an idea of what computer science engineers actually do.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Would you like to see some of the websites I've made?
You opened one of your projects on the laptop.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: This is actually my first website.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: I made it completely using HTML.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Semester subjects → chapters → topics → detailed explanations.
Yumei leaned a little closer to the laptop, carefully looking through the pages.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: We could even use this to revise our syllabus.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: You made all of this by yourself?
You switched to another project on the laptop.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: This one is a text-based strategy game.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: You're given a scenario, a task, and some available items.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Then you have to come up with a strategy to solve the problem.
Yumei quietly looked through the screen for a moment.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: I can barely type properly on my phone sometimes...

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: And here you are making entire websites.
There was genuine admiration in her voice.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Making websites like these really isn't a big deal.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Anyone can learn if they spend enough time on it.
You opened another project on the laptop.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: I think this one could actually help you improve your English vocabulary.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: The idea is to improve English and learn new vocabulary through stories.
Yumei leaned slightly closer to the screen.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: When you click on a word, you'll find its meaning, pronunciation, synonyms, antonyms...

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: You'll even see how the word changed and evolved over time.
For a moment, Yumei stayed quiet while looking through the website.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: This could genuinely help people learn.
There was warmth in her voice as she looked back at you.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: And this is actually my latest website.
You switched to another project on the laptop.
Yumei looked through it quietly for a few moments.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: I think I liked the third one the most.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: I think that's my favorite one too.
For a brief moment, Yumei seemed to hesitate.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: Me and my friend have been thinking about opening a website after school.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: We translate manhwas and want to publish them there.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: You could suggest my websites to your friends too, if you'd like.
A small smile appeared on Yumei’s face.
Yumei looked slightly embarrassed for a moment.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Good luck with your website idea.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: And if you ever need help making it, you can ask me.
Yumei blinked for a second before quietly laughing.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: I read manhwas and play mobile games.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Do you have any questions you'd like to ask me?
Yumei looked thoughtful for a moment.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: I don't usually ask people many questions.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: Sometimes I feel like I might make them uncomfortable.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: I'll just ask you the same thing.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: You can ask me anything you'd like.
A small smile appeared on Yumei’s face.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: I'm actually really interested in Indian culture.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Iraq seems like a really interesting country too.
Yumei looked out the library window for a moment.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: Kurdistan is a little different from the rest of Iraq.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: It's special in its own way.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: This is actually the first time I've met someone from Iraq.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Are people there usually kind and polite like you?
For a brief moment, Yumei grew quieter.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: Our language is different from Arabic.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: A lot about us feels separate.
There was a trace of emotion in her voice.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: But Kurdish people are divided into different regions.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: South Kurdistan, North Kurdistan, West Kurdistan, East Kurdistan...

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: People often call the larger southern part Iraqi Kurdistan.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: So, do people from other parts of Iraq usually like Kurdish people?

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: But my people there are really great.
The warmth in her voice returned.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Would you like to visit Korea someday?

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: That's actually one of my dreams.
Yumei let out a small laugh.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: Who would willingly go to North Korea?

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: If someone accidentally ends up in North Korea...

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Coming back alive might become the real challenge.
Yumei covered her mouth slightly, trying not to laugh too loudly in the quiet library.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: So what exactly attracts you to Indian culture?
Yumei seemed to think for a moment.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: When I was younger, I used to watch a lot of Bollywood movies.
A small smile appeared on her face.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: So I ended up finding Indian clothes really beautiful.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: Some of your food looks so delicious that I really want to try it someday.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: There are also some places in India I'd love to visit.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: And a lot of other things too.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: That's actually really nice to hear, Yumei.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: I think Bollywood is pretty popular in Middle Eastern countries too.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Some Indian food might end up being way too spicy for you.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: Even though I eat spicy food...

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: Indian spicy feels like an entirely different level.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Not all food here is spicy though.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Some dishes are, but definitely not everything.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: I actually want to try pani puri someday.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: There are quite a few Indian shops in Kurdistan now.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: I used to eat pani puri all the time when I was a kid.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: I'm honestly glad to hear Indian culture is becoming more common there.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: I still can't really buy it.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: The shops only exist in a few cities.
For a moment, Yumei looked thoughtful.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: From tomorrow, I really need to focus.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: If you're not used to studying for long hours...

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: If you try to suddenly change yourself too fast, you'll probably just get exhausted.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Consistency matters more than intensity, Yumei.
The library slowly became quieter as time passed.
Sunlight faded across the wooden tables while students gradually packed their bags.

chapter2.speaker: Yumei
chapter2.text: Thank you for helping me today.

chapter2.speaker: {username}
chapter2.text: Good luck with your studies and competition.
For some reason, the library felt a little quieter after she left.

chapter3.text: The next morning felt quieter than usual.
As students slowly settled into the classroom, Yumei quietly walked over and sat beside you.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Our exams are getting really close.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: And I feel kind of nervous.
A small smile appeared on your face.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: So even school toppers get nervous before exams?
She crossed her arms slightly and puffed her cheeks in protest.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I always get nervous before exams.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Meanwhile, you look way too confident.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I just don't care that much.
Yumei looked at you for a second.
Her overly serious tone made it obvious she was being sarcastic.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: The timetable isn't out yet, but I'm pretty sure biology will be the first exam.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Biology is kind of hard, you know.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I used to dislike biology too.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: It always felt difficult for me.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: But let me tell you something important.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Whenever a problem comes in life...

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Because worrying about the problem usually doesn't solve anything.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: How are you planning to solve this problem, Yumei?
Yumei looked slightly confused for a second.
She answered as if the answer was obvious.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Which subject do you like the most then?

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: So do you like maths too?

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I'm trying to convince myself to love it.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Math is a nightmare for a lot of students here too.
Yumei stared at you for a second.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: We definitely love maths so much.
The sarcasm in her voice was impossible to miss.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: What part of biology feels the hardest to you?

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Anything related to the human body.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Then what feels easiest to you?

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Honestly, that feels easiest to me too.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: How much do you still have left to study for the exam?

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I just need to review now.
A small smile appeared on your face.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Exactly what I expected from a topper.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Can you stop calling me topper again and again?
Yumei looked at you for a second before smiling faintly.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Maybe this time you'll beat me.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I wish you all the best for your exam.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I think you should be a little more confident in yourself.
Yumei immediately puffed her cheeks even more.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Confident enough to walk into the exam hall without studying...

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: And still somehow get my marks.
Despite the pout, there was obvious confidence hiding behind her words.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Maybe I underestimated the legendary topper.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Like you hesitate before asking or saying something.
A faint blush appeared on her face.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I'm actually not really an extrovert person.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: So talking sometimes feels a little difficult for me.
She looked away for a second.
You let out a small chuckle.
Yumei hesitated for a brief moment.
The blush on her cheeks still hadn't disappeared.
After a while, Yumei quietly looked up from her studies.
She hesitated for a moment before speaking again.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I was thinking about talking with you.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: But I couldn't think of anything to talk about.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I was thinking of talking to you too.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I thought maybe you'd think I'm being too clingy.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I actually like talking with my friends.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: You can talk to me whenever you want.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I had a feeling you wanted to talk but were hesitating to ask.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I don't know if shy is the right word...

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: It's just that I'm not really good at making conversations.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I kind of noticed that already.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: And honestly, that's a really good thing.
A faint blush slowly spread across Yumei's face.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: For thinking that way about me.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: The kind of things you say...

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: People our age nowadays mostly care about useless things.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: You told me your dream is to go to South Korea someday.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: What attracts you there so much?

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: The way they show food always makes it look really delicious.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Girls usually like skincare and stuff.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: So I want to try their skincare products too.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: They're popular and seem really good.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: South Korea is really famous for cosmetics.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I'm not really into plastic surgery that much.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: There are a lot more things about South Korea besides that.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: And yeah, those doctors are professionals.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I really want to study in a Korean college someday.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I'd like to go to South Korea for college too.
Yumei suddenly became quiet for a second.
She quietly mumbled something under her breath.
She quickly shook her head and tried to act normal again.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: It's actually a really good country for college.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Home is better than everywhere else, right?

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Home is my favorite place too.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Even if something bad happened to me someday...

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: I'd rather it happen there than anywhere else.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Maybe I love my place a little too much.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I wouldn't suggest becoming too attached to one place.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: But too much attachment can sometimes stop us from growing.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: If something happens, I'll try to accept it and deal with it.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I trust myself enough to handle things.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Whether I'm home or somewhere completely unfamiliar.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: What do you usually do during holidays, Yumei?

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: You mean the school break we had?
Yumei thought for a moment while walking beside you.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: And a lot more random things.
The evening hallway became quieter as both of you kept walking.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: But you're actually kind of adorable too.
Her cheeks turned pink almost immediately.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: And you turn red really quickly too.
The two of you eventually reached the main gate of the school.
The evening air felt calmer now.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: I want you to lead the conversation.

chapter3.speaker: {username}
chapter3.text: Ask me any question you have.
Yumei looked like she was seriously thinking.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: That's all I know how to ask.
The sky slowly turned darker as the evening settled in.
The school gate stood quietly behind Yumei.

chapter3.speaker: Yumei
chapter3.text: Thanks for talking with me today.
Yumei gave a small embarrassed smile.
As she slowly walked away into the evening, you couldn't help but smile.
